reasoning: The control CM-12 (1) - Information Location | Automated Tools to Support Information Location is focused on ensuring that automated tools are used to support the identification and location of information. This is a cloud-specific control related to password policies and information location, which does not have a direct equivalent in Kubernetes. Kubernetes does not inherently manage password policies or information location in the same manner as cloud IAM services. Therefore, this control is not applicable to Kubernetes security domains.
title: Information Location | Automated Tools to Support Information Location
